[](https://www.sketchbubble.com/en/presentation-online-vs-offline-business.html)

# Online Vs Offline Business PowerPoint and Google Slides Template

20 Downloads so far

**(2 Editable Slides)**

Download our Online vs. Offline Business PowerPoint and Google Slides template to describe the comparison of online and brick-and-mortar businesses based on set-up cost, set-up convenience, and more.

Animated PPT

[![Image 5: Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 1](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/d/d/dd3d8207e66a783f80183b0a547f205429ab80134e8096648e45a0b6708247d7/online-vs-offline-business-mc-slide1.png)](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/d/d/dd3d8207e66a783f80183b0a547f205429ab80134e8096648e45a0b6708247d7/online-vs-offline-business-mc-slide1.png "Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 1")

[![Image 6: Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 1](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/d/4/d4f3510d838fbd54dfb1029529118f76622e486bed7b808c7587a62451c9f763/online-vs-offline-business-mc-slide1.png)](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/d/d/dd3d8207e66a783f80183b0a547f205429ab80134e8096648e45a0b6708247d7/online-vs-offline-business-mc-slide1.png "Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 1")[![Image 7: Online Vs Offline Business Animated Presentation - SketchBubble")[![Image 8: Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 2](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/4/c/4cae9cf285a8087aa990ab5ca113bf74c533e4bd4bdbf7484b8c87729c50e5d2/online-vs-offline-business-mc-slide2.png)](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/5/c/5c8c1aaedf160e3cd0426bd26258ac0a2f6f5e737f5499d4922597fcaaee117b/online-vs-offline-business-mc-slide2.png "Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 2")[![Image 9: Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 3](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/9/d/9d9568d06ffdc949d61f072f35c2ede6554252465da03f842ec6ec0375c3ea3f/online-vs-offline-business-slide1.png)](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/b/1/b1912e7d18e8f95ef29f7877bc2b5e31f1820427a5a8029e445d0f1cbc147544/online-vs-offline-business-slide1.png "Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 3")[![Image 10: Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 4](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/6/d/6d4ab33b7c21ee295e8da4c57b71214916f78c9937f5975d771ac28a4af5102b/online-vs-offline-business-slide2.png)](https://cdn.sketchbubble.com/pub/media/catalog/product/optimized1/d/3/d33eda1e3c3c536cf53984fc2b952c462e477a9967e32a3360a44dbb2cf30ead/online-vs-offline-business-slide2.png "Online Vs Offline Business PPT Slide 4")

[Product Description](https://www.sketchbubble.com/en/presentation-online-vs-offline-business.html#description)

If you’re looking for a pre-designed deck to give your information a visual perspective and provide the most relevant experience to your audience, then hold your search here and download our aesthetically designed Online vs. Offline Business PPT template. You can use striking graphics to showcase the comparison of online and brick-and-mortar businesses based on set-up cost, set-up convenience, getting new customers, advertising and marketing, and more. Business consultants can leverage this set to explain the opportunities and pitfalls of each business type to help entrepreneurs and startup owners find the best fit.

### A Quick Glance at Slides

*   A beautiful illustration of an online business portal and a physical store showcases a brief overview of online and offline businesses.
*   Using a tabular infographic, you can illustrate the difference between online and offline businesses based on several factors.

### Key Features

*   You can make the desired changes without comprehensive technical skills or external aid.
*   The visuals can be scaled to any dimension without disturbing the optical resolution.
*   All elements are crafted from scratch, leaving no room for copyright breach incidents.

Download this well-crafted PowerPoint template to give your mundane presentations a new spin!

## Create compelling presentations in less time

Exclusive access to over 200,000 completely editable slides.
